Operate on the unravel knowledge base.

Phase 29 ships `merge` only — analysts use it to collapse identity
forks (cert rotation, display-name churn) the moment they appear. Phase 32
will land `show`, `list`, `diff` and other read-side subcommands.

Usage:
  unravel kb [command]

Available Commands:
  build       Headless: dissect ANY artifact and build/update its KB entry (capture + classify + static backfill)
  catalog     Browse and read the knowledge base
  curated     Read-only retrieval of curated kb-store artifacts for a kb_id
  drift       Knowledge-base drift tracking
  enrich      Populate and enrich knowledge-base rows
  findings    Adjudication findings
  gaps        Knowledge gap workflow
  ops         Knowledge-base maintenance
  transfer    Move knowledge-base data (export/import/diff)

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for kb

Global Flags:
      --debug              dump all intermediate artifacts to a timestamped debug/ directory
  -o, --output string      output directory
      --tools-dir string   directory with RE tools to prepend to PATH
  -v, --verbose            verbose output

Use "unravel kb [command] --help" for more information about a command.
